vBRIEFInfo.author: agent:deft-directive-swarm
vBRIEFInfo.description: migrate:vbrief LegacyArtifacts mechanism per #506 D5: narrative + 6KB inline threshold + sidecars + LEGACY-REPORT.md + deft-directive-sync Phase 6c.

plan.title: migrate:vbrief LegacyArtifacts mechanism for non-canonical pre-cutover content (#505)

narratives.Overview: Per #506 D5 locked parameters: LegacyArtifacts narrative per file (single string); 6KB inline threshold with overflow to vbrief/legacy/{stem}-{slug}.md; top-level ## boundary only (substructure preserved inside canonical narratives); PRD.md section-name diff only (OQ3-b), hand-edited sections captured with warning prefix; vbrief/migration/LEGACY-REPORT.md emitted; deft-directive-sync Phase 6c reviews and renames to LEGACY-REPORT.reviewed.md; files never deleted. Known-mappings hard-coded for v0.20 (shared with #495); normalization = case-insensitive + whitespace-collapsed + punctuation-stripped + word-separator-tolerant.
narratives.Problem: Migrator either drops non-canonical sections (data loss) or dumps the whole pre-cutover file into SpecificationContent (opaque wall of escaped markdown). Neither is acceptable.
narratives.Action: Edit scripts/migrate_vbrief.py to: (1) emit LegacyArtifacts narrative on specification.vbrief.json and PROJECT-DEFINITION.vbrief.json when non-canonical sections present; (2) capture rule at top-level ## boundaries; (3) apply known-mappings list (hard-coded v0.20); (4) sidecar overflow at 6KB to vbrief/legacy/{stem}-{slug}.md with pointer; (5) PRD.md section-name diff, warning prefix on hand-edited; (6) emit vbrief/migration/LEGACY-REPORT.md with suggested dispositions; (7) extend skills/deft-directive-sync/SKILL.md with Phase 6c Legacy Artifact Review; (8) migrator summary stdout announces capture.
narratives.Test: Synthetic fixtures under deft/tests/fixtures/ cover: (a) all-canonical no-legacy no-op; (b) small inline legacy; (c) >6KB sidecar; (d) PRD hand-edit warning; (e) section-title normalization variants. Assert LEGACY-REPORT.md format; assert .reviewed.md rename semantics; assert nothing deleted.
narratives.Outcome: Non-canonical content is preserved, labelled, reviewable, and never silently dropped. Known-mappings shared with #495 so canonical extraction and legacy capture agree on what is canonical.

items.title: Follow directive guidelines: AGENTS.md, deft/main.md, deft/QUICK-START.md, conventional commits, task check before commit
Capture rule: top-level ## boundaries only; substructure preserved inside canonical narratives
Hard-code known-mappings list per #506 (shared with #495); apply four normalization rules
6KB inline threshold; overflow to vbrief/legacy/{stem}-{slug}.md with pointer
PRD.md section-name diff (OQ3-b); hand-edited sections get warning prefix
Extend skills/deft-directive-sync/SKILL.md with Phase 6c Legacy Artifact Review (rename to .reviewed.md, never delete)
Migrator stdout summary announces legacy capture stats
Synthetic fixture tests for all capture-path branches
